015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.http.entity;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
020
021import java.io.*;
022
023import org.apache.juneau.http.*;
024
025/**
026 * A non-repeatable {@link HttpBody} that streams content from an {@link InputStream}.
027 *
028 * <p>
029 * Because the stream is one-shot, {@link #isRepeatable()} returns {@code false} and {@link #getContentLength()}
030 * returns {@code -1} (the transport must use chunked transfer encoding).
031 *
032 * <p>
033 * The caller is responsible for closing the wrapped stream after the response has been consumed.
034 *
035 * <p>
036 * <b>Beta — API subject to change:</b> This type is part of the next-generation REST client and HTTP stack
037 * ({@code org.apache.juneau.marshall.ng.*}).
038 * It is not API-frozen: binary- and source-incompatible changes may appear in the <b>next major</b> Juneau release
039 * (and possibly earlier).
040 *
041 * @since 9.2.1
042 */
043@SuppressWarnings({
044   "resource" // stream is caller-owned; StreamBody does not close it (documented in class Javadoc)
045})
046public final class StreamBody implements HttpBody {
047
048   private final InputStream stream;
049   private final String contentType;
050
051   private StreamBody(InputStream stream, String contentType) {
052      this.stream = assertArgNotNull("stream", stream);
053      this.contentType = contentType;
054   }
055
056   /**
057    * Creates a {@link StreamBody} with {@code application/octet-stream} content type.
058    *
059    * @param stream The input stream. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
060    * @return A new instance. Never <jk>null</jk>.
061    */
062   public static StreamBody of(InputStream stream) {
063      return new StreamBody(stream, "application/octet-stream");
064   }
065
066   /**
067    * Creates a {@link StreamBody} with the given content type.
068    *
069    * @param stream The input stream. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
070    * @param contentType The MIME content type. May be <jk>null</jk>.
071    * @return A new instance. Never <jk>null</jk>.
072    */
073   public static StreamBody of(InputStream stream, String contentType) {
074      return new StreamBody(stream, contentType);
075   }
076
077   @Override /* HttpBody */
078   public String getContentType() {
079      return contentType;
080   }
081
082   @Override /* HttpBody */
083   public void writeTo(OutputStream out) throws IOException {
084      stream.transferTo(out);
085   }
086
087   @Override /* HttpBody */
088   public boolean isRepeatable() {
089      return false;
090   }
091}
